idea: Terraform-managed encrypted artifact bucket for CI outputs
why_this_project_matters: This project introduces infrastructure as code with a small but valuable resource that many teams need early: a secure location for build artifacts and release bundles.
architecture: Terraform provisions a private S3 bucket with versioning, server-side encryption, and public access blocks. Outputs expose the bucket name and ARN so CI systems can reference them without hardcoded values.
steps: Initialize the Terraform working directory and review the execution plan.
Set the required variables for region, environment, and bucket prefix.
Apply the configuration and confirm the bucket policy and encryption controls.
Use the outputs in a CI system for artifact uploads.
Add lifecycle rules or replication once artifact retention requirements are clearer.
